title: Deinit Check
description: Monitor when a class instance is removed from memory using the deinitializer block.
problemStatement:
Memory cleanup! Define a class `Player` and implementation a `deinit` block that prints `"Player out of memory"`. 

**Requirement:** Since we can't manually call deinit, understand that it's called when ARC (Automatic Reference Counting) realizes the instance is no longer needed.
hints: Deinitializers are only available on class types.
